project.classicOnly: Project import currently supports classic projects only
project.title: Project Import Workspace
project.subtitle: Import external packages into project branches with a dry-run-first flow so every result is traceable and explainable.
project.introBody: This workspace follows “logical separation, operational decoupling”: image import and annotation import run independently; associated import is orchestration only.

mode.imagesOnlyDesc: Import images into target dataset only, without writing annotations.
mode.annotationsOnlyDesc: Import annotations only into the selected dataset and branch.
mode.associatedDesc: Use one archive to import images first, then annotations.

glossary.title: Glossary
glossary.formatCoco: COCO: JSON-based schema describing image-annotation relations, common for detection datasets.
glossary.formatVoc: VOC: One XML annotation file per image, clear structure and widely used in legacy datasets.
glossary.formatYolo: YOLO: One TXT coordinate file per image, lightweight for detector training pipelines.
glossary.formatDota: DOTA: per-image labelTxt quadrilateral annotations (poly8 + difficult) for oriented detection datasets.
glossary.formatYoloObb: YOLO OBB: supports rotated boxes (RBox/Poly8) for orientation-aware detection datasets.
glossary.branchDesc: Import writes a commit to the selected branch. master is usually default, but choose your feature branch as needed.
glossary.datasetDesc: Sample matching is limited to the selected dataset. Unmatched samples are skipped with reasons recorded.
glossary.replaceDesc: replace: treat imported sample as a full new snapshot and replace currently visible annotations.
glossary.mergeDesc: merge: merge by lineage and let imported items overwrite existing ones with the same lineage.

workspace.zipHint: ZIP only. Keep original directory structure when possible for stable sample matching.
workspace.directUploadNoDryRun: Direct image mode skips dry run and starts bulk upload tasks immediately.
workspace.duplicatePolicyAllow: This dataset allows duplicate sample names; imports will keep same-name files.
workspace.duplicatePolicyDedupe: This dataset disallows duplicate sample names; same-name files will reuse existing samples.
workspace.runHint: Recommended order: run dry run first, confirm planned new labels, then execute.
workspace.previewEmpty: Run dry run first to view preview details.
workspace.confirmCreateLabels: I confirm creating labels listed above
workspace.dryRunErrorPanelHint: Dry-run request failed. Check package structure or request parameters below.
workspace.selectDatasetFirst: Please select a target dataset first
workspace.newDatasetNameRequired: Please provide a name for the new dataset
workspace.noAvailableImportProfile: No import format is currently available for this project's annotation capabilities.
workspace.executeBlockedByUnsupportedType: Dry run found annotation types not enabled in this project. Update project policy or package before executing.

issueCode.SAMPLE_NOT_FOUND: Sample not found in target dataset: {{path}}
issueCode.SAMPLE_MATCH_BY_BASENAME: Matched by basename fallback; keep full folder structure when possible: {{path}}
issueCode.ANNOTATION_TYPE_NOT_ENABLED: Annotation type {{annotationType}} is not enabled ({{count}} items). Enabled types: {{enabledTypes}}
issueCode.IMAGE_NAME_AUTO_RENAMED: Sample name auto-renamed due to collision: {{path}}
issueCode.IMAGE_NAME_OVERWRITTEN: Later ZIP entry overwrote same sample name: {{path}}

hero.subtitle: Visual Active Learning Platform
hero.description1: Saki is a closed-loop intelligent annotation platform integrating dataset management, sample annotation (with version control), model training, and visual active learning.
hero.description2: With a human-in-the-loop workflow, high-value samples are prioritized for annotation and training to reduce cost and improve iteration efficiency.

dataAssets.title: Data & Assets
dataAssets.body: Dataset management and content addressing ensure data traceability, reuse, and deduplication.

annotationVersioning.title: Annotation Versioning
annotationVersioning.body: Annotation records are immutable. Commit snapshots and branch pointers make version history traceable like Git.

training.title: Training & Active Learning
training.body: Runtime runs training/inference as stateless executors, continuously closing the loop to surface high-value samples.

frontend.label: Frontend
frontend.stack: React 18 · Vite · TypeScript · Ant Design · Tailwind

executors.title: Executor Runtime Stats
executors.selectExecutor: Please select an executor to view details

sidebar.aboutText: Saki is a visual active learning platform.
